user.title: Create Times of the Day Sensor
user.description: Choose whether each boundary uses a fixed time or a sun event. Offsets are signed minutes (e.g. -15 = 15 minutes earlier, +30 = 30 minutes later). Note: the time fields are only used when mode = time.

data.name: [%key:common::config_flow::data::name%]
data.after_time: If mode is time: ON at
data.before_time: If mode is time: OFF at

init.title: Edit Times of the Day
init.description: Offsets are signed minutes. Time fields are only used when mode = time.
